## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / code quality
- [ ] Docs / tests only

## Checklist

- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes with no new issues
- [ ] `flutter test` passes (all existing tests green)
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested on a device or emulator (describe below)

## Testing notes

<!-- What did you test, how, and on which platform/device? -->

## Version bump (PRs into main only)

- [ ] `pubspec.yaml` version updated (semver + build number)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] F-Droid recipe and `fdroiddata` yml updated (if applicable)
